name: Cinnamon Scented Apple Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 3 Golden Delicious Apples - 1 1/2 lbs., peeled and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in a large pan of boiling, salted water until barely tender, about 5 minutes. Drain.
2. Rinse with cold water and drain well. Transfer to a large bowl.
3. Heat 2 tbsp butter in a large skillet. Add half of the apples and saute over medium heat for 5 minutes, turning once. Remove with a slotted spoon and add remaining apples to the skillet. Saute them. Return all apples to the skillet.
4. Sprinkle with 2 tbsp sugar and 1/2 tsp cinnamon. Saute 1 minute, tossing apples. Transfer to a separate bowl.
5. Melt remaining 4 tbsp butter in the skillet over low heat. Add 3 tbsp melted butter to noodles and mix well. Stir in nuts, raisins, lemon peel, and salt.
6. Whip egg whites to soft peaks. Beat in remaining 4 tbsp sugar until whites are stiff but not dry. Stir yolks and vanilla into noodles. Stir in 1/4 of the whites. Fold in remaining whites.
7. Add half of noodle mixture to a greased 13" x 9" x 2-inch baking dish. Top with sauteed apples in an even layer. Top with remaining noodle mixture. Spread gently to cover apples.
8. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 tsp cinnamon, then with remaining 1 tbsp melted butter. Cover and bake for 30 minutes at 350°F. Uncover and bake until set, about 20 more minutes. Serve hot.
